narrative:
Precinct Wash E (precinct in Scioto County) has 869 registered voters, with 62.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
